news.headline: Report analyzes 13,418 patents filed since 2010 on Large Language Models, reflecting organizations' increased focus on AI-driven innovations worldwide.
news.summary: Dublin - A report on Large Language Models (LLM) patents has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report covers 13,418 patents filed between 2010 and 2024 in major global jurisdictions. The dataset, sourced from global patent filings, is enhanced with market trend insights and growth forecasts. This information forms the basis for evaluating technological advancements in the LLM sector.

news.headline: Argentina announces $1 billion repo line with five top banks.
Bitcoin surges above $98,000 despite $333M outflows from BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF; stocks rise due to PMI data.
news.summary: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has surged by 2% on Friday, surpassing the $98,000 mark to reach approximately $98,273. The rally follows a notable event of record net outflows from U.S. spot ETFs the previous day. Specifically, BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust (NASDAQ:IBIT) observed a record-high outflow of $333 million on Jan. 2, marking the highest single-day outflow for the Bitcoin ETF since it was introduced. This surge in Bitcoin's value aligns with a general upturn in stock markets, propelled by the ISM manufacturing Purchasing Managers' Index (PMI) outperforming expectations for December. Alex Obchakevich, the founder of Obchakevich Research, attributed the significant outflow from IBIT to investors capitalizing on profits at the beginning of the year.

news.headline: E Source appoints Joe Eazor as CEO, leading the company through its growth chapter. Effective immediately.
news.summary: Joe Eazor, a seasoned executive, has been chosen as the new CEO of E Source, a prominent advisor to executives in the electric, gas, and water utilities industry. The announcement was made on January 3, 2025, and Eazor's appointment is effective immediately. E Source is entering its next phase of growth under his leadership.

news.headline: Las Vegas Raiders unveil 2024 Impact Playbook highlighting sustainability and community initiatives, reinforcing commitment to excellence.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, the Las Vegas Raiders have unveiled their 2024 Impact Playbook, showcasing a detailed overview of the team's sustainability, equity, and community programs benefiting the local community. The report highlights the Raiders', Allegiant Stadium's, and the Raiders Foundation's initiatives aimed at enhancing Las Vegas. This edition of the Playbook reflects on a year of successful community collaborations, progressive sustainability projects, and a strong dedication to promoting diversity, equity, and inclusion within the organization and across the community.

news.headline: Global sanitary pumps market to grow by USD 566.6 million by 2029, CAGR almost 4.1% driven by demand in food & beverage industry, AI impacting market.
news.summary: A recent report using AI to analyze market trends projects substantial growth in the global sanitary pumps market. According to Technavio, the market is expected to increase by approximately USD 566.6 million between 2025 and 2029. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 4.1% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Macron considers holding a referendum in a France divided by issues.
Investor rights firm Halper Sadeh LLC investigates CDMO, ATSG, STAF for securities violations.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, announced investigations into various companies for possible breaches of federal securities laws and fiduciary responsibilities towards shareholders. The focus is on Avid Bioservices, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDMO) and potential violations of regulatory laws. The investigations aim to uphold shareholder interests and ensure accountability.

news.headline: Netflix stock remains a sell, seen as overvalued in a market driven by momentum.
Solana founders back memecoins, find AI agents overrated. MEV a concern. Considering Base or Sui if not on Solana.
news.summary: MEV was highlighted as a significant worry, and they indicated that in case they were unable to develop on Solana, they would consider Base or Sui as alternatives.

news.headline: Hamas: A new round of ceasefire talks resumed in Doha on Friday, adds it is serious to reach a deal in the nearest time possible - Senior Hamas Official.
One Republican US representative votes against Mike Johnson for House Speaker—voting continues.

2025 Fill a Glass with Hope® campaign aims to provide 726,000 servings of fresh milk to PA food banks. Super Bowl champ supports fundraising at PA Farm Show.Total servings of milk: 726,000Location: PennsylvaniaEvent: PA Farm ShowDate: Jan. 3, 2025
news.summary: A former Super Bowl champion has partnered with the leaders of Fill a Glass with Hope to urge attendees at the PA Farm Show in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, to contribute towards combating hunger in the state. Held on January 3, 2025, this event marked the tenth anniversary of the Fill a Glass with Hope program. The initiative aims to provide milk to those in need across Pennsylvania, with over X gallons distributed since its inception. This collaboration seeks to raise awareness and encourage donations to tackle food insecurity in the region.

news.headline: Users can now convert digital gifts into TON NFTs on Telegram platform, enhancing crypto support.
news.summary: Telegram is expanding its involvement in the crypto industry by introducing a new feature that enables users to transform gifts into NFTs on The Open Network (TON). This move highlights the company's dedication to leveraging blockchain technology, showcasing their commitment to innovation in the digital space.

news.headline: 57 counterparties take $237.377b at the Fed reverse repo operation.
WFG appoints Benich to lead Customer Experience and Marketing, enhancing support for agents.
news.summary: A new head of Customer Experience (CX) and Marketing has been appointed at World Financial Group (WFG) in Cedar Rapids, Iowa on January 3, 2025. Anissa Benich will lead the marketing strategy to support agents aiding everyday Americans. This strategic move aims to enhance customer experiences and marketing efforts under Benich's leadership.

news.headline: Lion Electric lays off approx 150 employees in US and Canada amid ongoing CCAA proceedings.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, The Lion Electric Company (NYSE: LEV) (TSX: LEV) declared a temporary layoff affecting around 150 employees in Canada and the United States. The reduction includes employees from various departments within the company.

news.headline: Inflation in Euro-Zone highlights Lagarde’s 2025 challenge in managing.
Macron considers holding a referendum in France amid deep divisions across the country.
Brookfield Renewable reorganization finalizes on Dec 24, 2024, after receiving all required approvals.
news.summary: Brookfield Renewable Partners L.P. ("BEP") and Brookfield Renewable Corporation ("BEPC") have confirmed receiving all necessary approvals for the planned reorganization of BEPC. The Arrangement is set to take effect before markets open on December 24, 2024. BEP is listed on NYSE as BEP and TSX as BEP.UN, while BEPC is listed on TSX and NYSE as BEPC. The announcement was made on Dec. 20, 2024, via Globe Newswire.

news.headline: Brookfield Infrastructure reorganization to be effective Dec. 24, 2024, after receiving all approvals.
news.summary: In Brookfield on December 20, 2024, Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L.P. (“BIP”) (NYSE: BIP; TSX: BIP.UN) and Brookfield Infrastructure Corporation (“BIPC”) (TSX, NYSE: BIPC) disclosed that they have obtained full shareholder, court, and regulatory endorsements for the planned reorganization of BIPC (the “Arrangement”). As a result, the Arrangement is set to take effect before markets open on December 24, 2024.

news.headline: Local TV broadcasters celebrate new NEXTGEN TV devices, channels, and programming. 76% of US households can receive signal. Exciting options for consumer choice.
news.summary: In Washington, local TV broadcasters in America are celebrating the introduction of new ATSC 3.0 receivers that will be unveiled at the upcoming Consumer Electronics Show in Las Vegas. Currently, 76% of U.S. households can receive a NEXTGEN TV broadcast signal. These new receivers will offer affordable options for consumers, ranging from high-end NEXTGEN TV sets to accessories that can upgrade existing Android and Fire TV devices in households. This innovation will increase consumer choice and access to NEXTGEN TV technology.

news.headline: Key figures: U.S. debt at $36 trillion. Bezos, Fink, and Bessent believe economic growth is solution. History suggests otherwise.
news.summary: Jeff Bezos, Larry Fink, and Scott Bessent, who has been nominated as the Treasury pick by Donald Trump, are in agreement that accelerating economic growth is the most effective approach to addressing the massive $36 trillion debt of the United States. However, their belief contrasts with historical evidence suggesting otherwise.

news.headline: Biden receives political support for Nippon Steel's takeover of U.S. Steel.
news.summary: If President Joe Biden chooses to approve the contentious acquisition of U.S. Steel by Japan's Nippon Steel, he will have gained additional political support.

news.headline: Crazy Woman Creek Bancorp declares cash dividend of $0.32 per share for FY2024, emphasizing community involvement.
news.summary: In Buffalo, Wyoming, Crazy Woman Creek Bancorp (OTCPink: CRZY) and Buffalo Federal Bank, collectively known as The Banks of Buffalo, Sheridan, Gillette, and BFSB Mortgage of Evanston, continue to expand their franchise. Established in 1936, this bank has become a crucial business and community ally. The institution is committed to satisfying customers' banking requirements by emphasizing local decision-making and active community engagement. Their aim is to be the top community bank catering to individuals, families, and businesses across North-Central Wyoming.

news.headline: CFTC sweepstakes for top derivatives regulator role may be a key career move, historically not a top priority.
news.summary: The derivatives regulator on Wall Street has typically been considered a minor focus for new administrations.

news.headline: SAFE GROUP reports its financial results for H1 2024.
Elevai Labs Inc. rebrands as PMGC Holdings Inc. and relocates to Nevada in recent move. #rebranding #corporatechange
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that there has been a substantial increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week. Over 10,000 new cases have been reported, bringing the total number of confirmed cases to over 150,000. The death toll has also risen significantly, with over 500 new deaths reported, bringing the total number of fatalities to over 5,000. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and take precautions to prevent further spread of the virus. Additionally, hospitals are reportedly at full capacity, raising concerns about the healthcare system's ability to handle the surge in cases.

news.headline: Biden leaves a lasting impact on the semiconductor industry, with record investment of $52 billion.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has surged to 8.5%, representing an increase of 2.3% from the previous quarter. The number of job losses during this period reached a staggering 1.2 million, highlighting the severe impact of the economic downturn. Experts attribute this sharp rise in unemployment to the ongoing global pandemic, which has led to widespread business closures and layoffs. The government has announced measures to support those affected, including financial assistance and job training programs. It is hoped that these initiatives will help alleviate the financial strain on individuals and families facing unemployment during these challenging times.

news.headline: The report analyzes US missile defense spending between FY2023-FY2029, highlighting funding distribution among military branches and future spending estimates.
news.summary: A report titled "US Missile Defense Growth Opportunities, FY2024-FY2029" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report focuses on the US Department of Defense's missile defense expenditure from FY2023 to FY2029. It provides insights into the allocation of funds to different military branches, budget activities, and offers a forecast with projected spending. The report also discusses trends, challenges, drivers, and constraints faced by the Department of Defense in the missile defense sector.

news.headline: Traders aim to save Santa Rally as 10 S&P 500 stocks poised for year-end surge. Fed hints at rate pause, causing market turmoil.
news.summary: The stock market began the holiday season on a high note, with the Nasdaq 100 reaching a record-breaking 22,000 and optimism regarding interest rate cuts ahead of the Federal Reserve meeting. This led to expectations of a traditional Santa Rally in 2025. However, midweek, the market took a turn as Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's hawkish tone hinted at a pause in rate cuts, signaling a shift in monetary policy. The Fed had already cut rates by 100 basis points since September, but Powell suggested a prolonged pause, indicating rates were nearing neutral territory. This news came as a surprise and dampened expectations of further aggressive cuts, leading to a downturn in the market.

news.headline: LiveOne (LVO) complies with Nasdaq listing requirements; minimum bid price rule is met. Stock continues trading as "LVO".
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 20, 2024, LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), known for its focus on music, entertainment, and technology, shared that it has met Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement under the Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The company received formal written notice from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC confirming compliance, and the matter is now resolved. LiveOne's common stock will remain listed on Nasdaq with the symbol "LVO".

news.headline: Stocks remain steady in quiet market, Burlington Stores, Boston Scientific, and Vertex Inc. stocks are in focus.
news.summary: Analysts Ken Shreve and Ed Carson examine the market activity on Thursday, focusing on key stocks in the Stock Market Today report. Despite a relatively calm day, attention is drawn to prominent companies such as Burlington Stores, Boston Scientific, and Vertex Inc. for their performance. This information was highlighted in the latest update from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Workers in LA, Chicago, and Seattle strike at Starbucks due to failed negotiations on raises.
news.summary: Employees in Los Angeles, Chicago, and Seattle have initiated walkouts following unsuccessful negotiations between the company and the workers' union regarding salary increases.

news.headline: Fed cuts interest rates by 25 basis points, dollar surges to over 2-year high, Bitcoin drops below $100,000. Chair Powell's stance sparks market turmoil.
news.summary: During a December meeting, the Federal Reserve implemented a 25-basis-point interest rate reduction, lowering the target range to 4.25%-4.5%. This decision had a significant impact on markets. The surprising element was not the rate cut itself but rather the Fed's updated economic forecasts and Jerome Powell's outlook, which dashed hopes for more substantial rate cuts in 2025. The Fed's December economic projections indicated a higher inflation forecast for 2025, implying the possibility of only two rate cuts during the year. This contrasted sharply with previous expectations, leading to a shift in investor sentiment. Powell reinforced this cautious stance in a press conference by mentioning a planned 100-basis-point decrease in 2024. This announcement suggested a more conservative approach from the Fed moving forward.

news.headline: Alvotech (ALVO) joins Nasdaq Biotech Index (NBI) on Dec 23, 2024, boosting its presence in global biosimilar market.
news.summary: Global biotech firm Alvotech, known for developing and producing biosimilar medications globally, revealed that its stocks under NASDAQ: ALVO will join the Nasdaq Biotechnology Index (NASDAQ: NBI) as part of the index's yearly reconstitution. The company's addition to NBI will take effect at the start of the U.S. market trading on Monday, December 23, 2024. This move signifies Alvotech's growth and potential in the biotech sector.

news.headline: Possible minor economic impact from brief government shutdown, signaling dysfunction.
news.summary: A brief interruption in funding is likely to cause minor harm, potentially indicating government dysfunction.

news.headline: OpenAI considers changes to boost AGI mission, mulling transition to Public Benefit Corporation.
news.summary: OpenAI is reevaluating its organizational framework to align with its goal of advancing artificial general intelligence for the benefit of humanity. They are considering transitioning to a Public Benefit Corporation to fulfill this mission. This move demonstrates their commitment to ensuring that AI technologies serve the broader interests of society.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls 280 points amid rising Treasury yields, Nvidia and Tesla stock decline in market.
news.summary: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell by 290 points due to a continued increase in Treasury yields. Both Nvidia and Tesla experienced a decline in their stock prices on the current stock market.

news.headline: Fed cuts rates, plans 2 more in 2025. S&P 500 falls on doubts over dovish policy, signaling concerns for investors.
news.summary: As anticipated, the Federal Reserve reduced interest rates during its recent meeting and projected an additional two cuts for the year 2025. However, despite this dovish stance from the Fed, the S&P 500 index saw a decline amidst skepticism regarding the central bank's commitment to further rate cuts. This concern over the implementation of the Fed's stated policy led to a downturn in the stock market. The Investor's Business Daily reported on these developments in the financial sphere.

news.headline: US targets China's production of vital chips for appliances, machinery, and weaponry. Older-style chips are in focus.
news.summary: The traditional chips play a vital role in powering various appliances and machinery, including weaponry, making them essential components in multiple applications.

news.headline: OKX Ventures reveals 2024 report: 60+ projects and forecast 14 trends driving blockchain industry forward.
news.summary: The 2024 report from OKX Ventures has been published, showcasing investments made in more than 60 projects. The report also outlines 14 significant trends that are expected to influence the future of the blockchain industry.

news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes American Lithium Corp. to OTCQX. American Lithium Corp. traded on NASDAQ, now on OTCQX. (NUMBERS: 12,000 securities traded)
news.summary: On December 30, 2024, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that American Lithium Corp. (TSX-V: LI; OTCQX: AMLIF), a company specializing in lithium mining, has met the requirements to be listed on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. oversees trading for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. American Lithium Corp., which was previously listed on NASDAQ, has made the transition to OTCQX® Best Market for trading.

news.headline: Trump's expected rollback of climate policies unsettles green energy investors who have invested billions in renewables and electric vehicles. #Trump #RenewableEnergy #ElectricVehicles
news.summary: The incoming President, Donald J. Trump, is anticipated to eliminate numerous regulations and incentives that have drawn billions of dollars from private industries towards renewable energy and electric vehicles.

news.headline: Dow Jones down 0.8%, Nasdaq and small caps drop 1.5% in today's stock market. Warren Buffet buys VeriSign stock.
news.summary: Stocks on the Dow Jones tumbled below their 50-day moving average in today's market session. Nvidia experienced a decline as well. Notably, investor Warren Buffett made a purchase of VeriSign stock. The Dow Jones concluded with a 0.8% decrease in comparison to the previous close, while the Nasdaq and small-cap stocks saw a more substantial drop of about 1.5%. Live coverage of these market developments can be found in the latest from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Canadian officials meet with Trump team at Mar-a-Lago to talk Border and Tariffs. Trump warns of tariffs on exports unless migrants and fentanyl halted.
news.summary: The President-elect, Donald J. Trump, has issued a warning to impose tariffs on Canadian exports if the country does not cease the entry of migrants and fentanyl into the U.S.

news.headline: Injective and Aethir partnered to tokenize GPU compute resources, boosting access and efficiency in AI and blockchain with a tradeable token system.
news.summary: Injective (INJ) and Aethir have partnered to tokenize GPU compute resources, aiming to improve accessibility and efficiency in the AI and blockchain industries. This collaboration introduces a unique token system that allows trading of these resources. This initiative aims to revolutionize the sectors by leveraging the tokenization of GPU compute resources.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures slump; S&P 500 poised to dip below key level after sell-off. Nvidia signals buy point, Tesla deliveries awaited.
news.summary: Stock market futures are declining, with the S&P 500 expected to drop below a significant level following a sell-off on Friday. Nvidia has reached a new buying point, while Tesla is anticipated to release delivery numbers soon. The Dow Jones futures are down, signaling a potentially challenging trading day ahead.

news.headline: US stocks set to open higher for 'Santa Rally' despite recent events. 10-year Treasury at 4.53%, 2-year at 4.32%. Major indices up in premarket trading.Indices surged following lower-than-expected inflation data. S&P 500 up 1.09%. Real estate and small-cap stocks lead gains. Advancers beat decliners in S&P 500 after 14-day negative streak.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures rose after a volatile week which included a hawkish rate cut by the Federal Reserve, with two of the four major index futures showing higher premarket trade. The 10-year Treasury yield was at 4.53% and the two-year at 4.32%. The probability of no interest rate change at the upcoming Jan. 31, 2025 decision was at 91.4%. Markets will be closed on Wednesday and trading hours will be shortened on Christmas Eve. In premarket trade, the Nasdaq 100 was up 0.23%, S&P 500 up 0.07%, Dow Jones down 0.06%, and Russell 2000 down 0.15%. SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust was up 0.09% to $591.73 and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF rose 0.23% to $519.04. November’s inflation data was softer than expected, prompting a rally in major indices, with S&P 500 surging 1.09% and real estate sector leading the gains. The Nasdaq Composite closed at 19,572.60, S&P 500 at 5,930.85, Dow Jones at 42,840.26, and Russell 2000 at 2,242.37. The number of advancers surpassed decliners in the S&P 500 after a 14-day streak of negative market breadth.

news.headline: Acuren Corporation (OTCQX: TICA) joins OTCQX Best Market, OTC Markets Group's platform for trading 12,000 securities.
news.summary: On December 30, 2024, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Acuren Corporation (OTCQX: TICA), a prominent North American company offering crucial asset integrity services, has met the requirements to be listed for trading on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc., known for operating regulated markets facilitating trade in 12,000 U.S. and international securities, made this announcement.
